description_long: This is a large, vertically oriented cylindrical storage tank constructed primarily from dark, riveted metal panels. The tank is elevated on a sturdy metal framework, allowing clearance beneath for loading or unloading materials. A yellow safety railing encircles the top platform, and a matching yellow vertical ladder with a protective cage runs up one side, providing access to the upper area. The tank features a conical bottom section for efficient material discharge, and visible pipework is attached near the top, likely for filling or venting. The surface of the tank is weathered, with a matte, slightly rough finish, and the overall design is industrial and utilitarian, suitable for bulk storage of liquids or granular materials.
description: A tall, cylindrical metal storage tank with a yellow safety railing, access ladder, and conical base, supported by a metal frame and featuring industrial pipework.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow ladder and safety cage running up the center, with the tank's cylindrical body and top railing clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ladder and cage offset to the left, with the conical base and supporting frame more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view with the ladder not visible, focusing on the cylindrical tank body, conical base, and support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ladder and cage on the right, with the pipe attachment at the top more visible.
